
```{ojs}
makeDeciletype = function({
  decileData,
  labelData,
  arrowLeftHigh,
  arrowLeft,
  arrowLeftMedium,
  arrowRight,
  vizWidth = 500,
  vizHeight = 40
}) {

  return vl.layer(
    vl.markPoint({
      shape: path_neurath,
      size: 0.08,
      stroke: "black",
      strokeWidth: 0.8,
      filled: true
    })
    .data(decileData)
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("position")
        .scale({ domain: width >= 860 ? [-0.8, 9.8] : [-0, 10] })
        .axis(null),
      vl.opacity()
        .fieldN("isHighlighted")
        .scale({ domain: [false, true], range: [0.33, 1] })
        .legend(null),
      vl.fill()
        .fieldN("isHighlighted")
        .scale({ domain: [false, true], range: ["url(#hatch_left)", "url(#hatch_right)"] })
        .legend(null)
    ),
    vl.markText({
      dy: 86,
      dx: 14,
      align: "center",
      anchor: "middle",
      baseline: "top",
      fontSize: 15,
    })
    .data(labelData)
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("position")
        .axis(null),
      vl.text()
        .fieldN("label"),
      vl.opacity()
        .fieldN("isHighlighted")
        .scale({ domain: [false, true], range: [0.33, 1] })
        .legend(null)
    ),
    vl.markText({
      dx: -12,
      dy: 132,
      align: "right",
      baseline: "top",
      fontSize: 15,
      fontStyle: "italic"
    })
    .data([{ x: 9 }])
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("x")
        .axis(null),
      vl.text()
        .value("Höheres Einkommen ⟶")
    ),
    ...(width >= 860 ? [
      vl.markPoint({
        size: 0.04,
        stroke: "#333333",
        strokeWidth: 1,
        filled: false
      })
      .data(labelData)
      .encode(
        vl.x()
          .fieldQ("xArrow")
          .axis(null),
        vl.y()
          .fieldQ("yArrow")
          .axis(null),
        vl.shape()
          .fieldN("arrow")
          .scale({ domain: ["leftHigh", "left", "leftMedium", "right"], range: [arrowLeftHigh, arrowLeft, arrowLeftMedium, arrowRight] })
          .legend(null),
        vl.size()
          .fieldN("isHighlighted")
          .scale({ domain: [false, true], range: [0, 0.04] })
          .legend(null),
        vl.opacity()
          .fieldN("isHighlighted")
          .scale({ domain: [false, true], range: [0.33, 1] })
          .legend(null)
      )
    ] : [])
  )
  .width(width >= 860 ? vizWidth : (width - 24))
  .height(vizHeight)
  .config(config);

}
```
